patient_summary: Olivia is a 73-year-old female (telephone: +1 310 556 1256) with documented dyslipidemia and hypertension. Key diagnoses across records include mixed dyslipidemia, essential hypertension (benign), postoperative/unidentified anemia, and hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus. Notable labs: 07/03/2023 lipid panel (Triglycerides 158 mg/dL [H], Cholesterol 147 mg/dL, HDL 54 mg/dL, LDL 62 mg/dL), ferritin 266.8 ng/mL (H), iron 41 ug/dL (L), eGFR 58 ml/min/1.73m2 (L). Recent planned procedures include COLONOSCOPY WITH BIOPSY on 02/21/2025. Multiple care teams are listed including Hand HA, MD (PCP), Hershey CL, MD (PCP), and multiple cardiology, endocrinology, and gastroenterology providers. Functional assessments document difficulty walking/stairs; PHQ scores range from 0 (03/28/2023) to 3 (11/17/2020). Conflicts exist in DOB, legal sex entries, and tobacco-use documentation which should be reconciled with source records.
